updated.name: CareerOneStop / NLx "List Jobs V2"
updated.new_value: Offset-style path parameters: {startRecord}/{pageSize} (e.g. /v2/jobsearch/{userId}/{keyword}/{location}/{radius}/{sortColumns}/{sortOrder}/{startRecord}/{pageSize}/{days}); all parameters required on every request

updated.name: Fantastic Jobs / Active Jobs DB
updated.new_value: Offset/limit: limit param (1-1,000 per request, default 100) + offset param; increase offset by limit each call until a response returns fewer rows than limit

updated.name: Fantastic Jobs / Active Jobs DB
updated.new_value: Offset/limit: limit param (1-1,000 per request, default 100) + offset param; increase offset by limit each call until a response returns fewer rows than limit

updated.name: Coresignal
updated.new_value: Cursor-based: after parameter (numeric ID cursor, or score+timestamp+ID cursor when sorting by score) plus items_per_page (max 1,000/page); response includes x-next-page-after, x-total-pages, x-total-results headers

updated.name: Coresignal
updated.new_value: Cursor-based: after parameter (numeric ID cursor, or score+timestamp+ID cursor when sorting by score) plus items_per_page (max 1,000/page); response includes x-next-page-after, x-total-pages, x-total-results headers

updated.name: France Travail (ex-Pole emploi)
updated.new_value: Offset-style via range parameter (e.g. range=0-149, default 0-149); max 150 results/request, max range endpoint index 1149 (up to 1150 total results per query); rate-limited to 3 req/sec; larger result sets require narrowing with minCreationDate/maxCreationDate

updated.name: JobsPikr
updated.new_value: Cursor-based: size param (10-100/request, default 100) + cursor param; response returns next_cursor to pass into the next request; continue until response returns status: no_data

updated.name: Get on Board
updated.new_value: page/per_page query params; page default 1, per_page default and max 100

updated.name: Lightcast Jobs Canada
updated.new_value: Offset/limit-style (limit param, max 1,000/page; page param also supported per API changelog); OAuth bearer token required (1-hour validity)

updated.name: Lightcast Jobs Canada
updated.new_value: Default 10 requests/sec per client; adjustable via auth claims (e.g. postings:us:rate-limit:100/1, or unlimited on enterprise contracts); OAuth bearer tokens required, valid 1 hour

updated.name: RemoteJobs.org
updated.new_value: Offset/limit: limit param (min 1, max 50, default 20) + offset param (default 0, jobs to skip)

updated.name: RemoteJobs.org
updated.new_value: No signup/API key required; 'reasonable use' policy with no hard rate cap stated; max 50 jobs/request; contact provider (ryan@remotejobs.org) for higher volume

updated.name: Workday
updated.new_value: Page/Count via Response_Filter on Get_Job_Requisitions: Count (min 1, max 999, default 100), Page (default 1; Page param requires also setting As_Of_Entry_Date for a consistent result set across paged requests); response returns Total_Results/Total_Pages/Page_Results

updated.name: SINE Aberto (Sistema Nacional de Emprego / Ministerio do Trabalho e Emprego)
updated.new_value: N/A - data-sharing suspended since 3 Oct 2022 under Resolucao CODEFAT No. 956/2022 (suspending prior Resolutions 826/2019 and 844/2019) pending LGPD (Lei 13.709/2018) compliance updates; no active API to paginate

updated.name: SINE Aberto (Sistema Nacional de Emprego / Ministerio do Trabalho e Emprego)
updated.new_value: N/A - service suspended (see Pagination note)

updated.name: SINE Aberto (Sistema Nacional de Emprego / Ministerio do Trabalho e Emprego)
updated.new_value: N/A - service suspended (see Pagination note)

updated.name: SINE Aberto (Sistema Nacional de Emprego / Ministerio do Trabalho e Emprego)
updated.new_value: N/A - data-sharing suspended since 3 Oct 2022 under Resolucao CODEFAT No. 956/2022, pending LGPD compliance updates; no active service to rate-limit

updated.name: Jobs.cz
updated.new_value: N/A - write-only XML feed import for employers (postings pushed to LMC's g2.lmc.cz/import/... endpoint via Teamio/LMC integration); no public job-listings read/search API to paginate

updated.name: Profesia
updated.new_value: N/A - write/import API for employers to submit job listings to Profesia.sk (token-based bulk feed import); no public job-listings read/search API to paginate

updated.name: VietnamWorks Open API
updated.new_value: N/A - OAuth2 JSON API (api.vietnamworks.com/api/rest/v1) only supports Post Job and Get Application (from an employer's own postings) flows; not a job-listings search/read API, so no aggregatable pagination applies

updated.name: VietnamWorks Open API
updated.new_value: N/A (see Pagination note)

updated.name: ZipRecruiter API
updated.new_value: N/A - Partner Job API is a single-endpoint write API (api.ziprecruiter.com/partner/v0/job) for creating/updating/closing job listings on ZipRecruiter's network; not a paginated read/search endpoint

updated.name: Apideck
updated.new_value: Cursor-based: cursor param + limit (1-200, default 20); next/previous cursors returned in the response's meta.cursors property

updated.name: Apideck
updated.new_value: cursor

updated.name: Diffbot
updated.new_value: Offset/size via DQL Search API: from (offset, default 0) + size (default 50, max enforced so from+size <= 10,000 for facet queries; size=-1 returns all results)

updated.name: Diffbot
updated.new_value: offset

updated.name: Mantiks
updated.new_value: None - async export model: create a search export (Run Search Export), poll for completion, then GET /exports/{id}/leads returns the full array of result rows in a single response (no page/limit params)

updated.name: Mantiks
updated.new_value: None (full result array returned per completed export)

updated.name: Techmap.io
updated.new_value: page (default) or cursor (opt-in, mutually exclusive with page-based)

updated.name: Bright Data
updated.new_value: Async snapshot model: trigger a collection/filter job, poll status, then GET /datasets/snapshots/{id}/download with batch_size (min 1,000 records/batch) + part (batch number, starting at 1) to page through large snapshot results

updated.name: Bright Data
updated.new_value: part/batch (offset-style batching of a pre-built snapshot)

updated.name: Scrapingdog
updated.new_value: page-based: page parameter (default 1) on the Jobs Search Results (LinkedIn) endpoint; separate Google Jobs API and Indeed Scraper API products each have their own endpoint-specific pagination

updated.name: Scrapingdog
updated.new_value: page

updated.name: Piloterr
updated.new_value: page-based: page query parameter, up to 25 job listings per page (LinkedIn Job Search endpoint; Indeed Job Search and other endpoints have their own per-endpoint pagination)

updated.name: Piloterr
updated.new_value: page

updated.name: 4dayweek.io
updated.new_value: page/limit query params: v2 (recommended) - page (default 1) + limit (default 25, max 100); v1 (legacy) - page + limit only, same defaults; iterate ?page=1..N until has_more == false

updated.name: 4dayweek.io
updated.new_value: page

updated.name: 4dayweek.io
updated.new_value: Free, public, no-auth JSON API. 60 requests/minute per IP across /api/v1 and /api/v2 combined; over-limit returns HTTP 429 with Retry-After header; responses cached 60s at edge (Cache-Control: public, max-age=60); jobs refreshed a few times per day

updated.name: Workforce Australia
updated.new_value: N/A - API is write/management only (create/update/manage employer job ads and their status via OAuth2 RESTful API through the API Developer Portal); no public job-listings read/search endpoint to paginate

updated.name: CBOP - Centralna Baza Ofert Pracy (Poland public employment offices)
updated.new_value: Not page/offset-based - full criteria pull via SOAP WebService (POST to /integration/services/oferta or /v2/oferta with a Wojewodztwo/region, Jednostka/office, or Wszystkie/all criterion), returned as a ZIP of JSON files split into batches of max 1,000 offers per file
sources: https://oferty.praca.gov.pl/portal/dla-integratorow (Instrukcja pobierania ofert pracy z systemu ePraca, 01.06.2025)

updated.name: CBOP - Centralna Baza Ofert Pracy (Poland public employment offices)
updated.new_value: Batch (max 1,000 records/file, criteria-scoped SOAP pull, not a live page/cursor)
sources: https://oferty.praca.gov.pl/portal/dla-integratorow (Instrukcja pobierania ofert pracy z systemu ePraca, 01.06.2025)

updated.name: CBOP - Centralna Baza Ofert Pracy (Poland public employment offices)
updated.new_value: Max 20 service calls per registered Partner per availability cycle during 17:00-07:00 (excess returns 'Przekroczono limit wywolan uslugi'); calls outside MRPiPS-defined access hours return 'Usluga niedostepna'; requires pre-registered Partner name for authorization
sources: https://oferty.praca.gov.pl/portal/dla-integratorow (Instrukcja pobierania ofert pracy z systemu ePraca, 01.06.2025)

updated.name: CBOP - Centralna Baza Ofert Pracy (Poland public employment offices)
updated.new_value: 20 calls/cycle limit during 17:00-07:00 access window; service unavailable outside defined hours; two service versions available (legacy /oferta and /v2/oferta with language selection: pl/ru/by/en/ua)
sources: https://oferty.praca.gov.pl/portal/dla-integratorow (Instrukcja pobierania ofert pracy z systemu ePraca, 01.06.2025)

left_unknown.name: GOV.UK Find a Job (DWP)
left_unknown.reason: Official read/search API confirmed to exist (api.gov.uk/dwp/find-a-job/, endpoint findajob.dwp.gov.uk/search) but its technical spec ('FJ - Search API' PDF) is hosted on DWP's internal wiki (wiki.office.uc.dwpcloud.uk) and not publicly accessible; no public pagination parameters found.

left_unknown.name: GOV.UK Find a Job (DWP)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - internal-only technical documentation, no public rate limit figures found.

left_unknown.name: Get on Board
left_unknown.reason: No official rate-limit figures published; API docs (api-doc.getonbrd.com) note the API is in beta with no stated throttling policy.

left_unknown.name: Workday
left_unknown.reason: Workday does not publish a single official cross-tenant rate limit; actual throttling is tenant/contract-specific and only disclosed to customers directly (per multiple third-party integration guides), so no official figure can be cited.

left_unknown.name: Findwork.dev
left_unknown.reason: Official developer docs page (findwork.dev/developers/) requires an authenticated account login; could not access technical pagination details without credentials.

left_unknown.name: Findwork.dev
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - docs gated behind login.

left_unknown.name: ZipRecruiter API
left_unknown.reason: No official rate-limit figures published for the Partner Job API; ZipRecruiter partner support/FAQ page did not render usable content.

left_unknown.name: Jobs.cz
left_unknown.reason: No published numeric rate-limit figures found; only that Teamio/LMC implementation takes up to 24h and requires an LMC account manager.

left_unknown.name: Profesia
left_unknown.reason: No published numeric rate-limit figures found for the employer import API.

left_unknown.name: Portal del Empleo / Servicio Nacional de Empleo (STPS Mexico)
left_unknown.reason: No public developer API/documentation found for this government portal (searched gob.mx, empleo.gob.mx, datos.gob.mx); cannot confirm whether a programmatic API exists at all.

left_unknown.name: Portal del Empleo / Servicio Nacional de Empleo (STPS Mexico)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - no public API found.

left_unknown.name: Portal del Empleo / Servicio Nacional de Empleo (STPS Mexico)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - no public API found.

left_unknown.name: Portal del Empleo / Servicio Nacional de Empleo (STPS Mexico)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - no public API found.

left_unknown.name: VietnamWorks Open API
left_unknown.reason: No published numeric rate-limit figures found; access requires sales contact and consumer key, with a sandbox available for testing.

left_unknown.name: Workforce Australia
left_unknown.reason: Technical documentation is gated behind the API Developer Portal, which requires registration and an Australian Government Digital ID (myID); no public rate-limit figures found.

left_unknown.name: Workforce Australia
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - technical docs gated behind Developer Portal registration + Digital ID.

left_unknown.name: Job-Room Jobs API (SECO, Switzerland)
left_unknown.reason: No public developer documentation found for job-room.ch's API; the arbeit.swiss/job-room.ch site exposes no visible developer portal, and web/GitHub searches turned up no public technical reference.

left_unknown.name: VDAB Vacature API (Belgium - Flanders public employment service)
left_unknown.reason: A developer portal exists (developer.vdab.be) but returns 403 Forbidden without authentication/registration; no public pagination documentation accessible.

left_unknown.name: VDAB Vacature API (Belgium - Flanders public employment service)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - developer portal is access-gated.

left_unknown.name: VDAB Vacature API (Belgium - Flanders public employment service)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - developer portal is access-gated.

left_unknown.name: Talroo
left_unknown.reason: Talroo's Developer Tools page confirms a Search API, Classification API, and Job Status API exist, but technical specs ("View technical specs") are gated behind a partner account; no public pagination parameters found.

left_unknown.name: Talroo
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - technical specs gated behind partner account.

left_unknown.name: Oxylabs
left_unknown.reason: Oxylabs offers a general-purpose Web Scraper API/SERP API; no dedicated job-postings scraper product or endpoint was found (unlike Bright Data, Scrapingdog, or Piloterr), so no job-specific pagination mechanism to document.

left_unknown.name: Oxylabs
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - no dedicated jobs vertical found.

left_unknown.name: Zyte (formerly Scrapinghub)
left_unknown.reason: Zyte markets a 'Job Posting' managed data feed / Job Scraper API, but it is a custom, sales-quoted service ("Let's talk") rather than a self-serve product with public technical/pagination documentation.

left_unknown.name: Zyte (formerly Scrapinghub)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above - managed/custom service, no public API docs.

left_unknown.name: Nimble (Nimbleway)
left_unknown.reason: No dedicated job-postings product or public pagination documentation found on docs.nimbleway.com in this check; Nimble is a general-purpose web-unblocking/scraping infrastructure provider.

left_unknown.name: Nimble (Nimbleway)
left_unknown.reason: Same as above.

left_unknown.name: Workato
left_unknown.reason: Workato is a general iPaaS/automation platform, not a job-listings source; no dedicated pagination reference page found for its own REST API (docs.workato.com/workato-api/pagination.html 404s) in the time available.

left_unknown.name: Workato
left_unknown.reason: Same as above.
